title: artemisia angustifolia
intro: Artemisia angustifolia, also known as silver sage or white sage, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small yellow or white flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils, including thujone and camphor. The medicinal properties of Artemisia angustifolia have been shown to provide various health benefits, including relief from anxiety and stress, improved respiratory health, and a reduction in inflammation and pain. Artemisia angustifolia can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
